VT Logo Directions

A collection of 15 unique brand directions for VT, organized by the AI model that generated the base marks. Each section showcases the base organization mark followed by its specialized variants for `vt-playground`, `vt-design-system`, and `gemini-ai-lib`.

Codex GPT 5.4

classic directions marks 01-05

01. Fold (Base)

vt-mark-01-fold.svg
Sharp, engineering-heavy monogram with strong forward motion.

01. Fold (Playground)

vt-mark-01-fold-vt-playground.svg
Keeps the technical base mark but adds a brighter studio accent for experimentation.

01. Fold (Design System)

vt-mark-01-fold-vt-design-system.svg
A crisp and architectural monogram variant with a precise component-like accent.

01. Fold (AI Lib)

vt-mark-01-fold-gemini-ai-lib.svg
A compact library mark with clear structure and a small API-style signal accent.

02. Frame (Base)

vt-mark-02-frame.svg
Stable, platform-like direction that is easy to turn into a system badge.

02. Frame (Playground)

vt-mark-02-frame-vt-playground.svg
Feels like a reliable app shell with a playful signal node in the lower corner.

02. Frame (Design System)

vt-mark-02-frame-vt-design-system.svg
Probably the cleanest fit for a design-system badge or shared component registry icon.

02. Frame (AI Lib)

vt-mark-02-frame-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Feels dependable and package-oriented, with a stable badge silhouette for tooling use.

03. Orbit (Base)

vt-mark-03-orbit.svg
A hub or network-oriented direction for an umbrella brand feeling.

03. Orbit (Playground)

vt-mark-03-orbit-vt-playground.svg
A good fit if playground should feel like the central place for trying things out.

03. Orbit (Design System)

vt-mark-03-orbit-vt-design-system.svg
Useful if the design system should feel like the structured center of the workspace.

03. Orbit (AI Lib)

vt-mark-03-orbit-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Suggests a model or runtime core with a lightweight package identity.

04. Totem (Base)

vt-mark-04-totem.svg
A modular family language built to scale across package and project icons.

04. Totem (Playground)

vt-mark-04-totem-vt-playground.svg
Strong candidate for a package family because it already reads like a badge system.

04. Totem (Design System)

vt-mark-04-totem-vt-design-system.svg
Highly reusable for token, primitive, and component-level sub-branding.

04. Totem (AI Lib)

vt-mark-04-totem-gemini-ai-lib.svg
The most extensible option if the library grows helper packages or transport layers.

05. Ribbon (Base)

vt-mark-05-ribbon.svg
The most dynamic direction, with the strongest brand and motion energy.

05. Ribbon (Playground)

vt-mark-05-ribbon-vt-playground.svg
The boldest playground option, with the most obvious motion and experimentation vibe.

05. Ribbon (Design System)

vt-mark-05-ribbon-vt-design-system.svg
A branded design-system option that still keeps a controlled, systematic feel.

05. Ribbon (AI Lib)

vt-mark-05-ribbon-gemini-ai-lib.svg
A premium package identity that still reads as technical rather than consumer-first.

Gemini 3 Flash

geometric fusion marks 06-10

06. Abstract (Base)

vt-mark-06-abstract.svg
Hexagonal geometric fusion of V and T.

06. Abstract (Playground)

vt-mark-06-abstract-vt-playground.svg
A focused and geometric playground variant with a sharp layout.

06. Abstract (Design System)

vt-mark-06-abstract-vt-design-system.svg
A precise and systematic monogram built on architectural primitives.

06. Abstract (AI Lib)

vt-mark-06-abstract-gemini-ai-lib.svg
A technical and dense monogram variant optimized for low-level library use.

07. Pulse (Base)

vt-mark-07-pulse.svg
A rhythmic representation of signal and activity.

07. Pulse (Playground)

vt-mark-07-pulse-vt-playground.svg
Captures live telemetry and active studio signals in a compact mark.

07. Pulse (Design System)

vt-mark-07-pulse-vt-design-system.svg
A rhythmic representation of system state and component interactions.

07. Pulse (AI Lib)

vt-mark-07-pulse-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Ideal for representing streaming data or model inference signals in an SDK.

08. Orbit (Base)

vt-mark-08-orbit.svg
A central core with a circulating satellite element.

08. Orbit (Playground)

vt-mark-08-orbit-vt-playground.svg
Represents experimental nodes circulating around a stable platform core.

08. Orbit (Design System)

vt-mark-08-orbit-vt-design-system.svg
Suggests a central pattern library with circulating utility layers.

08. Orbit (AI Lib)

vt-mark-08-orbit-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Represents core model integration with various utility transport layers.

09. Layer (Base)

vt-mark-09-layer.svg
Stackable perspective for a depth-oriented brand feel.

09. Layer (Playground)

vt-mark-09-layer-vt-playground.svg
A multi-dimensional studio brand for complex exploratory work.

09. Layer (Design System)

vt-mark-09-layer-vt-design-system.svg
Perfect for a multi-layered design system with clearly separated concerns.

09. Layer (AI Lib)

vt-mark-09-layer-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Reflects a multi-layered SDK structure with clean separation of concerns.

10. Nexus (Base)

vt-mark-10-nexus.svg
A central hub for converging data and interactions.

10. Nexus (Playground)

vt-mark-10-nexus-vt-playground.svg
A convergence point for various experiments and playground modules.

10. Nexus (Design System)

vt-mark-10-nexus-vt-design-system.svg
The structural center of the component ecosystem and token registry.

10. Nexus (AI Lib)

vt-mark-10-nexus-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Central convergence of AI capabilities and various integration endpoints.

Claude Opus 4.6

radiant patterns marks 11-15

11. Prism (Base)

vt-mark-11-prism.svg
A triangular prism with internal refraction lines suggesting light decomposition.

11. Prism (Playground)

vt-mark-11-prism-vt-playground.svg
Refracted exploration energy, splitting ideas into distinct experimentation paths.

11. Prism (Design System)

vt-mark-11-prism-vt-design-system.svg
Decomposition into structured primitives, tokens, and component layers.

11. Prism (AI Lib)

vt-mark-11-prism-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Breaking down complex AI inputs into structured output channels.

12. Spark (Base)

vt-mark-12-spark.svg
A starburst radiating from a solid core, full of ignition energy.

12. Spark (Playground)

vt-mark-12-spark-vt-playground.svg
An ignition point for creative studio experiments and rapid prototyping.

12. Spark (Design System)

vt-mark-12-spark-vt-design-system.svg
A precise and radiant system core that powers every component outward.

12. Spark (AI Lib)

vt-mark-12-spark-gemini-ai-lib.svg
The ignition core of model inference and generative processing.

13. Weave (Base)

vt-mark-13-weave.svg
Interlocking chevrons forming a woven crossroads pattern.

13. Weave (Playground)

vt-mark-13-weave-vt-playground.svg
Threads of different features interlocking into one cohesive playground experience.

13. Weave (Design System)

vt-mark-13-weave-vt-design-system.svg
Tightly interlocking patterns reflecting systematic component composition.

13. Weave (AI Lib)

vt-mark-13-weave-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Interlocking text, audio, and image modalities into a unified SDK surface.

14. Beacon (Base)

vt-mark-14-beacon.svg
A signal tower emitting light, suggesting guidance and visibility.

14. Beacon (Playground)

vt-mark-14-beacon-vt-playground.svg
A guiding signal for developers exploring new features and workflows.

14. Beacon (Design System)

vt-mark-14-beacon-vt-design-system.svg
A reliable reference point for consistent design language across projects.

14. Beacon (AI Lib)

vt-mark-14-beacon-gemini-ai-lib.svg
A signaling tower for reliable API connectivity and model availability.

15. Crest (Base)

vt-mark-15-crest.svg
A shield emblem with a centered cross, evoking trust and authority.

15. Crest (Playground)

vt-mark-15-crest-vt-playground.svg
A protective emblem for your experimental workspace and sandbox.

15. Crest (Design System)

vt-mark-15-crest-vt-design-system.svg
A quality seal for the shared component library and design standards.

15. Crest (AI Lib)

vt-mark-15-crest-gemini-ai-lib.svg
A trust emblem for battle-tested, production-ready AI integrations.

Gemini Code Assist

fluid & structural concepts marks 16-20

16. Stream (Base)

vt-mark-16-stream.svg
A fluid, continuous path representing seamless integration.

16. Stream (Playground)

vt-mark-16-stream-vt-playground.svg
Dynamic flow with a vibrant studio terminal node.

16. Stream (Design System)

vt-mark-16-stream-vt-design-system.svg
Structured flow with a modular component-like anchor.

16. Stream (AI Lib)

vt-mark-16-stream-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Intelligent pathing with a central diamond inference accent.

17. Circuit (Base)

vt-mark-17-circuit.svg
Logic-driven paths evoking high-level engineering.

17. Circuit (Playground)

vt-mark-17-circuit-vt-playground.svg
A logic path ending in a creative experiment node.

17. Circuit (Design System)

vt-mark-17-circuit-vt-design-system.svg
Rigid architectural circuit with a system header accent.

17. Circuit (AI Lib)

vt-mark-17-circuit-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Multi-node circuit representing AI neuron connectivity.

18. Mesh (Base)

vt-mark-18-mesh.svg
A heavy, interwoven monogram of V and T.

18. Mesh (Playground)

vt-mark-18-mesh-vt-playground.svg
Woven structure with a creative studio accent.

18. Mesh (Design System)

vt-mark-18-mesh-vt-design-system.svg
Woven structure with a modular anchor point.

18. Mesh (AI Lib)

vt-mark-18-mesh-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Woven structure with an intelligent inference node.

19. Vault (Base)

vt-mark-19-vault.svg
A protective and structural shield-like monogram.

19. Vault (Playground)

vt-mark-19-vault-vt-playground.svg
Structural vault with a dynamic studio signal.

19. Vault (Design System)

vt-mark-19-vault-vt-design-system.svg
Architectural vault with a system-wide header.

19. Vault (AI Lib)

vt-mark-19-vault-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Secure vault with an integrated AI processor node.

20. Apex (Base)

vt-mark-20-apex.svg
A pinnacle-oriented triangular fusion of the brand.

20. Apex (Playground)

vt-mark-20-apex-vt-playground.svg
Upward growth with an experimental studio accent.

20. Apex (Design System)

vt-mark-20-apex-vt-design-system.svg
Upward growth with a stable system foundation.

20. Apex (AI Lib)

vt-mark-20-apex-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Upward growth with dual-node inference signals.

Codex GPT-5.3-Codex

fresh originals marks 21-25

21. Lattice (Base)

vt-mark-21-lattice.svg
A structural diamond lattice with guide lines and a compact VT core.

21. Lattice (Playground)

vt-mark-21-lattice-vt-playground.svg
Teal-forward lattice tuned for studio flow and rapid experimentation signals.

21. Lattice (Design System)

vt-mark-21-lattice-vt-design-system.svg
Blueprint-like lattice emphasizing order, spacing discipline, and component logic.

21. Lattice (AI Lib)

vt-mark-21-lattice-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Emerald lattice for infrastructure and runtime topology across AI integration layers.

22. Comet (Base)

vt-mark-22-comet.svg
A bright core and swept trail that captures speed, direction, and momentum.

22. Comet (Playground)

vt-mark-22-comet-vt-playground.svg
Fast exploration motif with a playful signal point for active studio sessions.

22. Comet (Design System)

vt-mark-22-comet-vt-design-system.svg
Controlled velocity for a system identity that feels dynamic but still precise.

22. Comet (AI Lib)

vt-mark-22-comet-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Streaming-leaning comet language for transport, inference, and runtime throughput.

23. Glyph (Base)

vt-mark-23-glyph.svg
A block-rune VT mark with perimeter rhythm and high recognizability at small sizes.

23. Glyph (Playground)

vt-mark-23-glyph-vt-playground.svg
Friendly, energetic glyph styling for UI surfaces where experimentation is central.

23. Glyph (Design System)

vt-mark-23-glyph-vt-design-system.svg
Ordered visual cadence for tokens, primitives, and composable system assets.

23. Glyph (AI Lib)

vt-mark-23-glyph-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Dense library-like glyph optimized for SDK docs, CLI badges, and package listings.

24. Harbor (Base)

vt-mark-24-harbor.svg
A calm harbor silhouette with an arched horizon and stable basin geometry.

24. Harbor (Playground)

vt-mark-24-harbor-vt-playground.svg
An inviting dock-like icon language for creative iteration and team handoff flow.

24. Harbor (Design System)

vt-mark-24-harbor-vt-design-system.svg
Stable harbor form translated into a calm but authoritative design-system identity.

24. Harbor (AI Lib)

vt-mark-24-harbor-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Navigation-first metaphor for reliable API endpoints and model operation safety.

25. Shard (Base)

vt-mark-25-shard.svg
A faceted crystal crest with sharp geometry and strong center-line hierarchy.

25. Shard (Playground)

vt-mark-25-shard-vt-playground.svg
Bright shard contrasts that emphasize experimentation and kinetic UI energy.

25. Shard (Design System)

vt-mark-25-shard-vt-design-system.svg
Facet logic adapted to a precise system language with strict visual alignment.

25. Shard (AI Lib)

vt-mark-25-shard-gemini-ai-lib.svg
Compute-oriented shard palette for infrastructure-heavy AI package branding.
